name: Solji Charón Peña
label: Software Developer | Computer Scientist
summary: Software Developer with a strong foundation in Computer Science, experienced in building scalable full-stack applications and implementing efficient data management solutions.

work_experience.summary: Developed an ERP system using React (TypeScript) and FastAPI for inventory, sales, and accounting.
highlights: Developed the Purchases and Reporting (PDF/Excel) modules.
Managed end-to-end deployment on the company's Ubuntu server.
Tech Stack: PostgreSQL, Nginx audit logging.

work_experience.summary: Designed and developed an end-to-end logistics ecosystem for shipment management, tracking, and customer support.
highlights: Backend Architecture: Built a centralized FastAPI API with a strict layered structure, SQLAlchemy and PostgreSQL, deployed on Railway.
React Frontends: Developed 3 apps (Public Landing, Admin Dashboard, Tracking Portal) using React + Vite + Tailwind, deployed on Vercel.
Automation & AI: Implemented a WhatsApp chatbot via n8n, Meta Cloud API, OpenRouter (LLM), and Google Sheets, self-hosted on a VPS with Docker Compose.

interests.name: Drawing
interests.summary: Creative expression and attention to detail.
